name: com.beastbeats.easing-playground
description: A visual easing toolkit for Unity. Preview 31 built-in easing curves, design your own with draggable cubic-bezier handles or Unity AnimationCurves, and drive any GameObject with them via a reusable EasingFunction type. Includes an editor window, a custom inspector with live preview, and a runtime library you can call from your own scripts.

samples.description: Squares moving with library, bezier, and custom-curve easings.
